scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --prefix backend" "npm run test --prefix frontend" "npm run test --prefix scraper"
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --prefix backend && npm run test:run --prefix frontend && npm run test:run --prefix scraper
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:run
scripts.gen:client: cd backend && npm run generate:spec && cd ../frontend && npm run generate:client
